_comment: Sprint manifest — read by regression.py R27. Set status to IN_PROGRESS when implementation starts. Archive to docs/sprint_archive/ on close.
_baseline_note: 437 confirmed entering (436 stable + 1 open-026 R8 addition). gov-regression-batch adds R33 + R34 (always-on) = +2 → 439. R27/R31 extensions are qualitative improvements to existing checks, not new numbered assertions.
_close_checklist: Manual steps at sprint close: (1) python3 sync_docs.py exits 0; (2) python3 regression.py → 439 PASS; (3) Archive manifest to docs/sprint_archive/.

items.title: regression.py — R33 rule-12 check, R34 cache-period check, extend R27/R31 quality gates
items.model_rationale: All additions are targeted string checks and loop extensions on existing patterns — no architectural judgment needed
items.pass_criterion: python3 regression.py → 439/439 PASS. R33 fires if raw Momentum score string present in dashboard header. R34 fires if _ticker_cache_period missing from market_data.py. R27 rejects manifest missing token_budget or Tier A IDs. R31 rejects empty N/A reasons.
items.playwright: N/A — regression.py only, no UI changes
changes: Add R33: assert no 'Momentum: X/100' pattern in dashboard.py _render_header_static section
Add R34: assert '_ticker_cache_period' exists as module-level dict in market_data.py
Extend R31: require reason string after 'N/A —' when playwright field starts with 'N/A'
Extend R27: validate 'token_budget' key present in IN_PROGRESS manifests
Extend R27: validate all 5 Tier A check IDs present in checks[] array
Extend R27: validate GSI_WIP.md contains 'Status:' + 'IDLE' when manifest status is 'COMPLETE'

items.title: compliance_check.py — add week_summary.py to SEBI compliance scope (GAP-05)
items.model_rationale: Single dict entry addition and clone of existing check pattern — no judgment needed
items.pass_criterion: python3 compliance_check.py → ALL PASS. New check validates SEBI disclaimer present in pages/week_summary.py. GAP-05 closed.
items.playwright: N/A — compliance script only, no UI changes
changes: Add check: assert 'SEBI' in open(files['ws']).read() with same error message pattern as C1
Update check count comment in preamble

items.title: sprint-monitor.md + CLAUDE.md — Playwright hard gate + Phase 3 trigger review step (GAP-02, GAP-04)
items.model_rationale: Text edits to skill/doc files — protocol wording, no logic or architecture
items.pass_criterion: sprint-monitor.md Step 2a requires explicit user command (playwright-done or playwright-defer) before sprint proceeds to Step 3. CLAUDE.md Phase 3 close protocol includes snapshot Q-trigger review step.
changes: sprint-monitor.md: rewrite Step 2a as a blocking gate requiring '/sprint-monitor playwright-done' or '/sprint-monitor playwright-defer <reason> <PLAYWRIGHT-NN,...>'
sprint-monitor.md: add two new commands to Commands table: playwright-done | playwright-defer
sprint-monitor.md: add Step 2a handling block (parallel to Step 3 complete block)
CLAUDE.md: add Q-trigger review item to Phase 3 close protocol checklist

items.title: new-session.md — ACTIVE resume path writes minimal snapshot before resuming (GAP-01)
items.model_rationale: Resume-path snapshot requires judgment: what constitutes a safe minimal snapshot, how to handle partial deviation checks, and how to signal to the next-session reader that this was a resume-snapshot vs full snapshot
items.pass_criterion: ACTIVE resume path no longer early-exits past snapshot. Writes SNAPSHOT-NNN tagged RESUME with: regression baseline + sprint status + 'Full deviation check deferred — resumed from CHECKPOINT'. Proceeds to CHECKPOINT resume after.
changes: Step 1 ACTIVE branch: replace 'Skip the rest of this command' with 'Run minimal resume protocol (Steps 2–4 abbreviated)'
Add 'Step 1b — minimal resume protocol' section: run regression → write RESUME-tagged snapshot → then resume from CHECKPOINT
SNAPSHOT RESUME format: header flags it as RESUME type; Q01 only (baseline); all other Q marked 'deferred — resume session'; no deviation comparison attempted
After writing snapshot: proceed to CHECKPOINT block resume as normal

doc_updates_required: CLAUDE.md regression section baseline count update
CLAUDE.md sprint close protocol playwright gate reference
CLAUDE.md Session Manifest new-session skill behaviour note

items.model_rationale: All targeted string checks and loop extensions on known patterns
Single dict entry + clone of existing check pattern
Resume snapshot flow requires judgment on what 'minimal' means safely

token_budget.notes: All 4 items sequential. No parallel agents needed — files don't overlap. CLAUDE.md touched in gov-skills-haiku and gov-new-session but different sections — no conflict.

token_optimisations.decision: Batch all regression.py gap additions into one item
token_optimisations.detail: 6 gaps all touch regression.py. One Read + one Edit + one regression run covers all. 6 separate items would each re-read the ~900-line file.

token_optimisations.decision: Batch Playwright gate + trigger review into one skill item
token_optimisations.detail: Both are doc-only text edits to skill/CLAUDE.md. One context load covers both.
